title: 手绘等距街景插画
prompt: Draw a hand-drawn isometric diagram of this street
prompt_en: Draw a hand-drawn isometric diagram of this street
author: @AmirMushich
revised_prompt: 一张横幅的手绘风格等距视角（Isometric）街道插画。画面采用斜上方的等距俯视视角，没有透视灭点，所有建筑和街道均按标准的等距网格线排列，呈现出严谨的立体感与手绘墨水线条的温润质感。一条双向车道的街道从画面左下角向右上方倾斜延伸。路面呈浅灰色，中间绘有黄色的双向分隔线，十字路口处画有清晰的白色斑马线。街道左侧排布着两栋相连的三层复古商业建筑。第一栋底层是一家咖啡馆，外墙涂有温暖的米黄色，门上方伸出红白相间的条纹遮阳篷，门头招牌上清晰地写着 'CAFE'，下方附有小字 'Fresh Coffee'。店外的人行道上摆放着两组户外圆桌和椅子。二层和三层是住宅公寓，带有黑色的锻铁栏杆阳台，阳台上点缀着盆栽绿植。紧邻的第二栋建筑采用红砖外墙，一楼设有宽大的玻璃橱窗，深色木质招牌上写着 'CITY BOOKS'。街道右侧分布着一家花店和一家便利店。花店门前搭建了木质花架，招牌为绿色底白色手绘字体 'BLOOM & GROW'，门外的人行道上摆满了各种盛开的盆栽花卉。旁边的便利店门面较为现代，悬挂着蓝底白字的招牌 'DAILY MART'。街道上分布着几辆手绘风格的交通工具：一辆明黄色的复古出租车正准备驶过斑马线，一辆蓝色的厢式货车停在书店门前的路边停车位上。街道两侧配备了丰富的市政设施，包括黑色的复古铸铁路灯、红色的消防栓、深灰色的圆柱形垃圾桶，以及等距种植在方形树池中的茂盛阔叶行道树。斑马线前立着一块八角形的红色 'STOP' 交通标志牌，右侧人行道的一根电线杆上挂着白色的限速牌，上面写着 'SPEED LIMIT 30'。画面中点缀着几个简笔画风格的人物：一位行人正推着婴儿车经过花店，一名骑着自行车的年轻人正沿着街道右侧前行。整体画面以细腻的黑色钢笔线稿勾勒轮廓，辅以清新、明快、低饱和度的淡水彩晕染上色，光影柔和，构图饱满且完美契合横向的宽幅比例。
revised_prompt_en: A hand-drawn style isometric street illustration in a banner format. The scene is depicted from an oblique overhead isometric perspective with no vanishing points; all buildings and streets are aligned along a standard isometric grid, producing a rigorous three-dimensional effect combined with the warm texture of hand-drawn ink linework. A two-lane street extends diagonally from the lower-left corner toward the upper right. The road surface is light gray, with a yellow center dividing line and clearly drawn white zebra crossings at the intersection. On the left side of the street stand two adjoining three-story vintage commercial buildings. The ground floor of the first building houses a café with warm cream-colored exterior walls; a red-and-white striped awning extends above the door, and the storefront sign clearly reads 'CAFE' with the smaller text 'Fresh Coffee' beneath it. Two sets of outdoor round tables and chairs are placed on the sidewalk in front of the shop. The second and third floors are residential apartments featuring black wrought-iron balcony railings adorned with potted green plants. The adjacent second building has a red brick exterior, with a spacious glass display window on the ground floor and a dark wooden sign reading 'CITY BOOKS.' On the right side of the street are a flower shop and a convenience store. The flower shop has a wooden flower rack erected in front, a sign with green background and white hand-lettered text reading 'BLOOM & GROW,' and the sidewalk outside is filled with various blooming potted flowers. The adjacent convenience store has a more modern façade, with a blue sign bearing white text reading 'DAILY MART.' Several hand-drawn style vehicles are distributed along the street: a bright yellow vintage taxi is about to cross the zebra crossing, and a blue box van is parked in a curbside parking space in front of the bookstore. Both sides of the street are equipped with abundant municipal amenities, including black vintage cast-iron streetlamps, red fire hydrants, dark gray cylindrical trash bins, and lush broadleaf street trees planted at regular intervals in square tree pits. An octagonal red 'STOP' traffic sign stands before the zebra crossing, and a white speed limit sign reading 'SPEED LIMIT 30' hangs on a utility pole on the right-side sidewalk. The scene is dotted with several simply drawn figures: a pedestrian pushing a baby stroller past the flower shop, and a young person riding a bicycle along the right side of the street. The overall illustration is outlined with delicate black pen linework and colored with fresh, bright, low-saturation light watercolor washes. The lighting and shadows are soft, and the composition is full and perfectly suited to the horizontal wide-format aspect ratio.
prompt_zh: 绘制这条街道的手绘等距图（isometric diagram）。

title: 名画人物 OOTD
prompt:
为图片人物生成不同职业风的OOTD，时尚穿搭和配饰，和人物色系一致的纯色背景，Q版 3d，c4d渲染，保持人脸特征，姿势都要保持一致，人物的比例腿很修长

构图：9:16
顶部文字：OOTD，左侧为人物ootd q版形象，右侧为穿搭的单件展示

先来第一个职业：时尚设计师
prompt_en:
Generate a Q-style 3D C4D-rendered character based on the person in the photo, dressed in a fashion-forward “outfit of the day” (OOTD) inspired by a specific profession.
Profession: Fashion Designer
– Keep the original facial features and character pose
– Stylize the character with a cute, long-legged chibi proportion
– Outfit and accessories should reflect the profession, including trendy designer wear, glasses, sketchbook or tablet, and stylish shoes
– Match the outfit with fashion accessories to complete the look
– Use a solid background color that complements the character’s overall color palette (no gradients or textures)

Composition: Aspect ratio: 9:16
Top text: “OOTD”
Left side: the full-body chibi character wearing the complete outfit
Right side: individual clothing items and accessories laid out separately, as if in a style breakdown
author: @ZHO_ZHO_ZHO
revised_prompt:
一张Q版3D风格的时尚穿搭展示海报，采用精致细腻的C4D渲染质感。画面为9:16的竖版构图，背景为纯净的低饱和度奶咖色（米色调），与整体的高级感色系保持一致。画面光线柔和均匀，带有典型的3D渲染体积光和细腻的阴影。

画面顶部居中位置有醒目的3D立体粗体大写英文字母 'OOTD'，其正下方有一行较小的无衬线字体英文小写字母 'fashion designer'。

画面主要分为左右两个部分：
左侧站立着一位Q版3D女性角色，形象设定为时尚设计师。她面容精致可爱，拥有大眼睛和利落的栗色微卷短发，虽然是Q版风格，但身材比例呈现出明显的修长腿部特征。她保持着自信的姿态，左手叉腰，右手自然下垂并握着一块夹着设计草图的画板。她的穿搭极具时尚感：外穿一件黑色解构主义不对称西装外套，内搭简约的白色丝质吊带衫；下半身穿着一条垂坠感极佳的黑色高腰阔腿裤，脚踩一双银色尖头细跟高跟鞋。为了凸显职业特征，她的脖子上挂着一条明黄色的裁缝软卷尺，头顶架着一副黑色猫眼墨镜。

画面右侧以上下悬浮排列的形式，将左侧人物身上的穿搭单品进行了拆解展示，每个单品均呈现精美的独立3D模型质感，并在右侧配有清晰的小字说明标签：
最上方展示的是一副黑色猫眼墨镜，旁边标注文字 'Cat-eye Sunglasses'。
其下方是一件平铺展示的黑色不对称西装外套，旁边标注文字 'Deconstructed Blazer'。
接着是一条盘成圆形的明黄色软卷尺，旁边标注文字 'Tape Measure'。
再向下是一条折叠整齐的黑色高腰阔腿裤，旁边标注文字 'Wide-leg Trousers'。
最下方是一双银色尖头高跟鞋，旁边标注文字 'Silver Stilettos'。
revised_prompt_en:
A Q-version (chibi) 3D-style fashion outfit showcase poster with an exquisite and refined C4D rendering quality. The composition is in a 9:16 vertical format, with a pure, low-saturation café-au-lait (beige-toned) background that maintains a consistent premium color palette. The lighting is soft and even, featuring typical 3D-rendered volumetric light and delicate shadows.

At the top center of the image are prominent 3D bold uppercase English letters 'OOTD,' with a line of smaller sans-serif lowercase English text 'fashion designer' directly beneath.

The image is primarily divided into left and right sections:
On the left stands a Q-version 3D female character, designed as a fashion designer. She has an exquisite and cute face with large eyes and neat chestnut-brown slightly wavy short hair. Although rendered in a Q-version style, her body proportions feature noticeably elongated legs. She strikes a confident pose with her left hand on her hip and her right hand hanging naturally, holding a clipboard with design sketches. Her outfit is highly fashionable: she wears a black deconstructionist asymmetric blazer over a minimalist white silk camisole; on the lower half, she wears a pair of beautifully draped black high-waisted wide-leg trousers and silver pointed-toe stiletto heels. To highlight her professional identity, a bright yellow tailor's soft tape measure hangs around her neck, and a pair of black cat-eye sunglasses rests atop her head.

On the right side of the image, the outfit items worn by the character on the left are deconstructed and displayed in a vertically floating arrangement. Each item is presented as an exquisite standalone 3D model, accompanied by a clear small-text label on the right:
At the top is a pair of black cat-eye sunglasses, labeled 'Cat-eye Sunglasses.'
Below that is a flat-laid black asymmetric blazer, labeled 'Deconstructed Blazer.'
Next is a bright yellow soft tape measure coiled into a circle, labeled 'Tape Measure.'
Further down is a neatly folded pair of black high-waisted wide-leg trousers, labeled 'Wide-leg Trousers.'
At the bottom is a pair of silver pointed-toe high heels, labeled 'Silver Stilettos.'
prompt_zh:
为图片人物生成不同职业风的OOTD，时尚穿搭和配饰，和人物色系一致的纯色背景，Q版 3d，c4d渲染，保持人脸特征，姿势都要保持一致，人物的比例腿很修长

构图：9:16
顶部文字：OOTD，左侧为人物ootd q版形象，右侧为穿搭的单件展示

先来第一个职业：时尚设计师

title: 雨滴玻璃后的都市夜景
title_en: Urban Night View Through Raindrop Glass
prompt: 図1の写真に図2の[ガラス]の効果を重ねてください。
prompt_en: Please overlay the [glass] effect from image 2 onto the photo in image 1.
author: @ZHO_ZHO_ZHO
revised_prompt: 宽画幅的摄影合成照片，画面呈现了透过一层带有强烈水滴纹理的湿润玻璃观看都市夜景的场景。画面最前端覆盖着逼真的透明玻璃材质效果，玻璃表面密布着大小不一的晶莹雨滴，部分水珠受重力影响正沿着玻璃表面蜿蜒滑落，留下清晰的透明水痕；玻璃边缘带有轻微的冷凝雾气效果。透过这层玻璃，背景是一张繁华的城市夜景照片。背景街道两侧悬挂着错落有致的霓虹灯牌，街道上行驶的汽车前照灯散发着暖黄色的光束，尾灯则呈现明亮的红色。路边隐约可见撑着雨伞、穿着深色大衣的模糊行人身影。整体光影呈现出强烈的电影质感，背景中的红、蓝、紫、金等各色霓虹灯光透过前景的雨滴发生物理折射，在画面中化作大片丰富且迷幻的圆形光斑（散景效果）。清晰锐利的前景雨滴纹理与失焦、模糊的绚丽城市背景形成了强烈的景深与视觉对比。
revised_prompt_en: A wide-format composited photograph presenting a scene of an urban nightscape viewed through a layer of wet glass with a pronounced water droplet texture. The foremost plane of the image is covered with a realistic transparent glass material effect, its surface densely covered with glistening raindrops of varying sizes. Some water droplets, affected by gravity, are meandering down the glass surface, leaving clear transparent water trails; the edges of the glass exhibit a slight condensation fog effect. Through this layer of glass, the background is a photograph of a bustling city nightscape. Neon signs of varying heights hang on both sides of the background street; headlights of cars driving along the street emit warm yellow beams, while their taillights glow a bright red. Blurred silhouettes of pedestrians holding umbrellas and wearing dark coats are faintly visible along the roadside. The overall lighting conveys a strong cinematic quality. The red, blue, purple, gold, and other colored neon lights in the background undergo physical refraction through the foreground raindrops, transforming into large expanses of rich and psychedelic circular light spots (bokeh effect) across the image. The sharp, crisp foreground raindrop texture contrasts dramatically with the defocused, blurred, and dazzling city background, creating a striking sense of depth of field and visual contrast.
prompt_zh: 请将图2的[玻璃]效果叠加到图1的照片上。

title: 羊毛毡棕熊场景
prompt: A felted wool figure of a [subject], handcrafted with soft fibers, uneven stitching, and visible textures. Set within a miniature diorama of layered fabrics and pastel props, the scene radiates cozy, storybook charm like a still from a tactile, stop-motion fairytale made entirely of felt and thread.
prompt_en: A felted wool figure of a [subject], handcrafted with soft fibers, uneven stitching, and visible textures. Set within a miniature diorama of layered fabrics and pastel props, the scene radiates cozy, storybook charm like a still from a tactile, stop-motion fairytale made entirely of felt and thread.
author: @azed_ai
revised_prompt: 一张定格动画风格的微缩手工场景摄影图。画面主体是一只用羊毛毡手工制成的小棕熊，位于画面的视觉中心。小棕熊的表面布满柔软的羊毛纤维，带有明显的毡化纹理和不均匀的手工缝线痕迹。小熊体态圆润可爱，穿着一件浅蓝色的小毡布背心，脖子上系着一条红色的毛线围巾，它的一只爪子提着一个由粗糙麻线编织的微型小篮子，篮子里装着两颗红色的羊毛毡小苹果。小棕熊置身于一个用层叠布料和柔和色彩道具搭建的微缩童话森林场景中。地面由多层绿色和土黄色、边缘带有不规则剪裁痕迹的不织布交叠而成，模拟起伏的草地。小熊脚边散落着几朵淡粉色和鹅黄色的羊毛毡小蘑菇。背景中有几棵微缩树木，树干由棕色粗毛线紧密缠绕而成，树冠则是大块的绿色和薄荷色羊毛毡团。画面采用宽幅构图，微距摄影视角带来了浅景深效果，背景略微虚化，使焦点完美集中在小熊和前景的材质细节上。温暖柔和的侧光照亮场景，在羊毛和布料表面投下柔和的阴影，极大地凸显了纤维的毛绒触感。整体色调由温暖的大地色与柔和的马卡龙色组成，全部由毡和线构成的画面散发着手工制作的温度与舒适的童话绘本魅力。
revised_prompt_en: A stop-motion animation style miniature handcrafted scene photograph. The main subject is a small brown bear handmade from wool felt, positioned at the visual center of the frame. The surface of the small brown bear is covered with soft wool fibers, featuring distinct felting textures and uneven hand-stitched seam marks. The bear has a round and adorable body shape, wearing a light blue small felt vest, with a red yarn scarf tied around its neck. One of its paws holds a miniature basket woven from coarse hemp twine, containing two small red wool felt apples. The small brown bear is set within a miniature fairy-tale forest scene constructed from layered fabrics and soft-colored props. The ground is composed of multiple overlapping layers of non-woven felt in green and earthy yellow tones, with irregularly cut edges, simulating undulating grassland. A few small pale pink and goose-yellow wool felt mushrooms are scattered around the bear's feet. In the background stand several miniature trees, their trunks tightly wound with brown chunky yarn, and their canopies formed from large clumps of green and mint-colored wool felt. The image uses a wide-format composition, and the macro photography perspective produces a shallow depth of field effect, with the background slightly blurred, perfectly focusing attention on the bear and the textural details of the foreground. Warm, soft sidelight illuminates the scene, casting gentle shadows on the wool and fabric surfaces, greatly accentuating the plush tactile quality of the fibers. The overall color palette consists of warm earth tones and soft macaron colors, and the entire scene—composed entirely of felt and yarn—exudes the warmth of handcraftsmanship and the cozy charm of a fairy-tale picture book.
prompt_zh: 一个用羊毛毡制作的[subject]人偶，以柔软纤维手工制作，带有不均匀的缝线和可见的纹理。置于一个由层叠织物和柔和色调道具搭建的微缩立体透视模型（diorama）中，场景散发着温馨的绘本般的魅力，如同一部完全由毛毡和线制成的触感定格动画童话中的静帧画面。

title: 食谱信息图设计
prompt: Create step-by-step recipe infographic for creamy garlic mushroom pasta, top-down view, minimal style on white background, ingredient photos labeled: "200g spaghetti", "150g mushrooms", "3 garlic cloves", "200ml cream", "1 tbsp olive oil", "parmesan", "parsley", dotted lines showing process steps with icons (boiling pot, sauté pan, mixing), final plated pasta shot at the bottom
prompt_en: Create step-by-step recipe infographic for creamy garlic mushroom pasta, top-down view, minimal style on white background, ingredient photos labeled: "200g spaghetti", "150g mushrooms", "3 garlic cloves", "200ml cream", "1 tbsp olive oil", "parmesan", "parsley", dotted lines showing process steps with icons (boiling pot, sauté pan, mixing), final plated pasta shot at the bottom
author: @egeberkina
revised_prompt: 一张宽幅的极简风格食谱信息图，采用完全的俯视视角，背景为干净的纯白色。画面整体分为上下两个主要区域，以清晰的逻辑展示奶油大蒜蘑菇意面的制作过程。画面的左上角用黑色无衬线字体写着大标题 'Creamy Garlic Mushroom Pasta Recipe'。上半部分的左侧整齐排列着各准备好的食材的真实俯视照片，每种食材旁边都配有黑色的标签文字：一小把生意大利面，旁边标注 '200g spaghetti'；一些切好的新鲜口蘑片，标注 '150g mushrooms'；三瓣剥好的大蒜，标注 '3 garlic cloves'；一个装有白色淡奶油的小玻璃壶，标注 '200ml cream'；一小木勺金黄色的橄榄油，标注 '1 tbsp olive oil'；一块淡黄色的帕马森干酪，标注 'parmesan'；以及几片新鲜的绿色欧芹叶，标注 'parsley'。上半部分的右侧是制作步骤流程图，由黑色的虚线串联起三个极简风格的黑色线条图标及配套的文字说明：第一个节点是一个冒着热气的煮锅图标，下方写着文字 '1. Boil pasta'；虚线向右延伸至第二个节点，是一个平底炒锅图标，下方写着 '2. Sauté garlic & mushrooms'；虚线继续向右延伸至第三个节点，是一个带有搅拌勺的碗状混合图标，下方写着 '3. Mix with cream'。随后，虚线从第三个图标处向下延伸，直达画面的正下方。画面的底部中央展示了最终成品的俯视特写照片：一个白色的圆盘中盛放着做好的奶油大蒜蘑菇意面，面条被浓郁的白色酱汁包裹，表面散落着炒至金黄的蘑菇片，顶部点缀着磨碎的帕马森干酪屑和切碎的绿色欧芹。整体视觉风格干净、现代，光线明亮且分布均匀，食材和成品的色彩鲜明自然，与白色的背景形成舒适的对比，所有文字均清晰可辨。
revised_prompt_en: A wide-format minimalist-style recipe infographic, shot from a completely overhead perspective, with a clean pure white background. The overall image is divided into two main areas, top and bottom, presenting the preparation process of creamy garlic mushroom pasta in a clear, logical layout. In the upper left corner, the main title 'Creamy Garlic Mushroom Pasta Recipe' is written in a black sans-serif font. On the left side of the upper half, real overhead photographs of each prepared ingredient are neatly arranged, each accompanied by black label text: a small bundle of raw spaghetti, labeled '200g spaghetti'; some sliced fresh button mushrooms, labeled '150g mushrooms'; three peeled garlic cloves, labeled '3 garlic cloves'; a small glass pitcher containing white light cream, labeled '200ml cream'; a small wooden spoonful of golden olive oil, labeled '1 tbsp olive oil'; a block of pale yellow Parmesan cheese, labeled 'parmesan'; and a few fresh green parsley leaves, labeled 'parsley'. On the right side of the upper half is a preparation step flowchart, connected by black dashed lines linking three minimalist-style black line icons with accompanying text descriptions: the first node is a steaming pot icon, with the text '1. Boil pasta' written below; the dashed line extends to the right to the second node, a flat sauté pan icon, with '2. Sauté garlic & mushrooms' written below; the dashed line continues to the right to the third node, a bowl-shaped mixing icon with a stirring spoon, with '3. Mix with cream' written below. The dashed line then extends downward from the third icon, reaching directly to the bottom center of the image. At the bottom center of the image, an overhead close-up photograph of the final dish is displayed: a white round plate holds the finished creamy garlic mushroom pasta, with noodles coated in a rich white sauce, sautéed golden-brown mushroom slices scattered across the surface, and the top garnished with grated Parmesan cheese shavings and chopped green parsley. The overall visual style is clean and modern, with bright and evenly distributed lighting. The colors of the ingredients and the finished dish are vivid and natural, forming a comfortable contrast against the white background, and all text is clearly legible.
prompt_zh: 创建一张奶油蒜香蘑菇意面的分步食谱信息图，俯视视角，白色背景上的极简风格。食材照片带有标注："200g spaghetti"、"150g mushrooms"、"3 garlic cloves"、"200ml cream"、"1 tbsp olive oil"、"parmesan"、"parsley"，用虚线和图标（煮锅、煎锅、搅拌）展示制作步骤流程，底部放置最终装盘的意面成品照片。
